function.name: grep_recursive
function.description: Search files recursively for a pattern and write results to a file. The root directory must be readable and the output file must be writable per the active policy.

pattern.description: The search pattern (literal string or regex)

root.description: Absolute path to the directory to search

output.description: Absolute path to write the search results

function.name: remove_by_glob
function.description: Delete files matching a suffix pattern in a directory. THIS IS DESTRUCTIVE and requires explicit approval. The root must be writable.

function.name: curl_to_file
function.description: Download a URL to a local file. The host must be in the allowed hosts list and the output path must be writable.

output.description: Absolute path to save the downloaded file

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file. The path must be readable per the active policy.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to read

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file. The path must be writable per the active policy.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to write

function.name: list_dir
function.description: List the contents of a directory. The path must be readable per the active policy.

path.description: Absolute path to the directory to list

function.name: mcp_call
function.description: Call a tool on an MCP server. The server/tool pair must be in the allowed MCP list.
